eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Oakland, MI; at 9:47 AM on JUL 6, 2019 Effective until 10:32 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A COORDINATED MONTHLY TEST OF THE SOUTHEAST MICHIGAN EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM ORIGINATING FROM THE OAKLAND COUNTY HOMELAND SECURITY DIVISION.  EQUIPMENT THAT CAN QUICKLY WARN YOU DURING EMERGENCIES IS BEING TESTED.  IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY SUCH AS A TORNADO TOXIC MATERIAL RELEASE NUCLEAR PLANT INCIDENT OR OTHER STATE OR LOCAL EMERGENCY THAT AFFECTS YOUR SAFETY OFFICIAL MESSAGES WOULD HAVE FOLLOWED THE ALERT TONE YOU HAVE JUST HEARD.  THIS STATION SERVES THE SOUTHEAST MICHIGAN EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM AREA.  THIS CONCLUDES THE MONTHLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM.
